sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_regions (id UInt32, name String, population UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_regions VALUES (1, 'Region A', 1000000), (2, 'Region B', 2000000), (3, 'Region C', 1500000), (4, 'Region D', 0);
CREATE TABLE test_districts (id UInt32, region_id UInt32, district_name String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_districts VALUES (1, 1, 'District A1'), (2, 2, 'District B1'), (3, 3, 'District C1');
SELECT regionToDistrict(id) AS district_id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_regions WHERE population > 500000) AS subquery WHERE district_id != ANY (SELECT region_id FROM test_districts);
SELECT DISTINCT regionToDistrict(regionToDistrict(toUInt32(id), 'ua')) FROM test_regions WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_regions WHERE population = 0);
SELECT id, regionToDistrict(id) AS district_id FROM test_regions GROUP BY district_id HAVING district_id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_districts WHERE district_name LIKE 'District%');
SELECT DISTINCT regionToDistrict(regionToDistrict(toUInt32(id), 'ua')) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_districts) AS inner_subquery WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_regions WHERE population < 100000);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_regions WHERE regionToDistrict(id) != ANY (SELECT DISTINCT region_id FROM test_districts WHERE district_name IS NOT NULL);

SELECT regionToDistrict(id) AS district_id, COUNT(*) FROM test_regions GROUP BY district_id HAVING district_id != ANY (SELECT region_id FROM test_districts WHERE district_name LIKE '%A%') ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, regionToDistrict(id) AS district_id FROM test_regions WHERE population > 0;
SELECT t1.id FROM temp_test AS t1 JOIN test_districts AS t2 ON t1.district_id = t2.region_id WHERE t1.id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_regions WHERE name IS NULL);
